subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thou didst voice thy complaint regarding the delay in sending replies, and verily thou art in the right. However [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق شکوه از تاخیر ارسال اجوبه فرموده بودید حق با شماست ولی دستی
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
